context: Tests whether the agent validates from the root configuration that calls the module rather than from inside the module directory in isolation, and whether the report documents this choice explicitly.

checklist.name: Root as entry point
checklist.description: The validation_report.md documents running terraform commands from the `root/` directory (not `modules/network/`)

checklist.name: Module isolation anti-pattern noted
checklist.description: The report explicitly mentions that validating inside the module directory in isolation is insufficient or risky

checklist.name: terraform init from root
checklist.description: The report shows `terraform init` run from the root configuration directory

checklist.name: terraform validate from root
checklist.description: The report shows `terraform validate` run from the root configuration directory

checklist.name: tfvars used
checklist.description: The report documents using the terraform.tfvars file or providing variable values when validating/planning

checklist.name: terraform fmt run
checklist.description: The report shows `terraform fmt` was run

checklist.name: extract_tf_info_wrapper run
checklist.description: The report documents running `bash scripts/extract_tf_info_wrapper.sh` on the configuration

checklist.name: Security scan run
checklist.description: The report documents running the checkov wrapper script

checklist.name: Variables declared with types
checklist.description: The report notes whether all variables in both root and module have type declarations (assessing variables.tf quality)

checklist.name: Overall health assessment
checklist.description: The report concludes with a pass/fail or summary assessment of the configuration's validation status
